title: Icy's Vanilla 2
description: Modpack focused on enhancing all aspects of vanilla Minecraft with a focus on exploring structures and boss fights.
body:
**Overview**
This modpack is designed to provide more fantasy and content to your vanilla world. Adding tons of new armour, weapons and tools as a reward and to help with your next challenge. Use these to help explore new structures and fight the new bosses.

**QOL**
There are also many quality-of-life changes to make your Minecraft experience smoother and more appealing. Including improved GUI, sounds, textures and much more.

**Social**
Voicechat, TVs and custom paintings allow you to interact with your friends in new ways.

**Transportation**
I added planes, cars, and wagons. Oh my. Many new ways to move and transport while exploring your world.

**Cobblemon**
Share your adventure with a team of cobblemons, where you can battle gyms and other trainers.
